hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes fragmented provider results into a unified workflow that helps compliance teams manage reviews, cases, and audit evidence efficiently.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to standardize and interpret varied data from multiple providers, which slows review processes and increases manual workload. This inconsistency leads to fragmented risk visibility and weakens audit-ready documentation across digital asset workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects and normalizes data from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one unified workflow that supports consistent reviews, audit evidence and streamlined compliance operations for VASPs.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY standardizes and normalizes fragmented provider results, routing them through risk rules and reviews to create consistent cases, decisions, evidence and reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects and standardizes provider results into structured workflows, cases, decisions and evidence for consistent compliance review without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with standardized provider outputs, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment to support clear, defensible workflows for operational and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY standardize provider outputs for review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider results integrate into connected workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved from provider data
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports consistent risk review across providers
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, case management and reporting into structured, auditable workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY standardize provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes fragmented provider data by aggregating checks, alerts and risk signals into consistent cases and decision workflows for clearer, faster reviews across providers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete case history, decision logs and linked evidence to support audit-ready records and defendable review processes for compliance teams.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY is designed to integrate with existing compliance providers and tools, connecting their outputs without requiring replacement or disruption of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers and structures their outputs into connected compliance workflows rather than replacing the underlying services.
final_title: Standardize and connect provider results for review
final_description: Review how SFTY normalizes provider outputs into structured workflows, cases and evidence for clearer compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
